channel.title: Blog on JTH
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on JTH

item.title: Welcome to my new blog!
item.description:
Dear reader,

Welcome to the first post on my new tech-blog. This website will contain articles about my personal interests. As these posts can be very different from each other, all of them will touch the subject technology.

After running a successful blog in the past it is again itching to start over. In the past my blog was located at bloobz.be. 2025 will be the year where I start blogging again, doing posts about smart home, home servers and homelabs, product reviews and so on.
